events.name: Michael Brown
events.transcript: Hello, our team cannot access the analytics dashboard.

events.name: Priya Nair
events.transcript: I can help with that. Are you seeing an error code when signing in?

events.name: Michael Brown
events.transcript: Yes, it says authentication token expired.

events.name: Priya Nair
events.transcript: Please clear session cache and re-authenticate; I have also reset your access token.
